hooks.prompt: Evaluate the proposed file mutation. Deny it when it modifies raw/, .git/, or .obsidian/, or changes AGENTS.md, meta/schema.md, meta/ontology.md, or meta/policies.md without an explicit governance-change request. Also deny deletion, rename, merge, or split of canonical wiki pages unless explicitly approved. Return a concise reason when denied.

For a second-brain mutation workflow, allow stopping only if the response reports scope, sources processed, files changed, independent verification result, unresolved review items, and ledger/log updates. Otherwise identify the missing completion evidence.
